clauses.statement: A needs_changes or block review remains immutable while each finding is classified and appended as an attempt with a concrete disposition and fingerprint.

test_refs.case: RFR-S-1 RFR-S-2 one-fix plan preserves verdict and creates a bounded task

clauses.statement: Only repairable findings create tasks with acceptance clause, code scope, and test scope, and those tasks delegate through the Agent Runtime coordinator; boundary-sensitive blocks stop at a Human Checkpoint.

test_refs.case: RFR-S-2 repair task delegates only through the Agent Runtime coordinator
RFR-S-3 unrepairable block creates a Human Checkpoint

clauses.statement: A repair converges only when verification, pr prepare, and a closed independent same-role re-review all bind to the repaired current HEAD; stale or implementation-session review evidence fails closed.

test_refs.case: RFR-S-4 RFR-S-5 repaired attempt requires current-head verification and independent fresh re-review

clauses.statement: The repair state machine covers one-fix convergence, multi-attempt repair, unrepairable block, stale evidence, repeated-finding no-progress, and maximum-attempt stop.

test_refs.case: RFR-S-6 multi-attempt repeated fingerprint without HEAD progress stops no_progress
